entries.definition:
dh–b–dh–b to make something dangle or move to and fro; to perplex; to harm; to be in a state of commotion. Of this root, only مُذَبْذَبُون mudhabdhabūn occurs once in the Qur’an.
مُذَبْذَبِينَ mudhabdhabīna [pl. of pass. part. مُذَبْذَب mudhabdhab] ones who are pulled from two opposite directions, who keep swinging from one side to the other, waverers (4:143) مُّذَبْذَبِينَ بَيْنَ ذَٰلِكَ لَا إِلَىٰ هَٰؤُلَاءِ وَلَا إِلَىٰ هَٰؤُلَاءِ wavering all the time between [this and] that, [belonging] neither to one side nor the other.

326                                     ذ/خ/ر

مُذَبْذَبِينَ mudhabdhabīna [pl. of pass. part. مُذَبْذَب mudhabdhab] ones who are pulled from two opposite directions, who keep swinging from one side to the other, waverers (4:143) مُّذَبْذَبِينَ بَيْنَ ذَٰلِكَ لَا إِلَىٰ هَٰؤُلَاءِ وَلَا إِلَىٰ هَٰؤُلَاءِ wavering all the time between [this and] that, [belonging] neither to one side nor the other.

326                                     ذ/خ/ر
